title: Thai Stir Fry Potatoes
description: A sweet and sour stir fry dish made with Thai-inspired flavors and crispy potatoes.

ingredients.name: Thai sweet potatoes
ingredients.notes: Peel and slice into thin strips

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced sweet potatoes and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp of vegetable oil, sour sauce, and Thai stir-fry seasoning.
Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and coated with the sauce.
Garnish with a pinch of flaky sea salt and serve immediately.
